display_name: Set up the final battle climax through strategic coordination.

field_values.scene_title: Set up the final battle climax through strategic coordination.
field_values.action_summary: Having secured knowledge to open the gates, Carter coordinates a multi-pronged plan: one group to seize the great gates and another detachment to strike at the palace heart.
field_values.emotional_beat: Strategic intensity and readiness for war.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of Carter directing troops; wide shots showing the different moving parts of the plan; close-ups on maps or tactical signals.
movement_notes: Position of the various detachments relative to the gates and palace.
field_values.transition_notes:

- scene_title: `Set up the final battle climax through strategic coordination.`

## Production Intent

Set up the final battle climax through strategic coordination.

## Storyboard

Having secured knowledge to open the gates, Carter coordinates a multi-pronged plan: one group to seize the great gates and another detachment to strike at the palace heart.
